texto: We can deny angels exist, convince ourselves they can't be real. But they show up anyway, at strange places and at strange times. They can speak through any character we can imagine. They'll shout through demons if they have to. Daring us, challenging us to fight.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sucker Punch movie sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “We can deny angels exist, convince ourselves they can't be real. But they show up anyway, at stra…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, angels, esperanca, útil em momentos de esperanca e struggle.
